summary: P1 Case Manager Document Privileges Testing Complete - All 11 features verified working. Backend validation for mandatory rejection comments (min 5 chars) working correctly. Frontend CM Dashboard shows Documents tab with search/filter, batch selection, review dialog with uploader info and View File button, and case detail shows uploader name and review comments.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed - frontend uses /api/cases/{id}/custom-document-request instead

categories.document_review_validation: Verified via curl - rejection/revision_required requires comment (min 5 chars), approval works without comment
categories.reviewer_info: 1/1 passed - GET /api/documents/case/{id} returns uploader_name and reviewer_name
categories.notification: 1/1 passed - Review creates notification for uploader with rejection reason
categories.ticket_creation: 1/1 passed - Ticket creation for additional doc request works
categories.cm_access: 2/2 passed - CM can access documents across all assigned cases with required fields
categories.batch_review: 2/2 passed - Batch approve/reject works, rejection still requires comment
categories.reviewer_name_storage: 1/1 passed - Review stores reviewer_name in document record

frontend_tests.documents_tab: PASSED - Shows search input, type filter, status filter, documents table with all columns
frontend_tests.table_columns: PASSED - Table has: Document, Client, Case, Type, Status, Uploaded By, Uploaded, Review, Actions
frontend_tests.batch_selection: PASSED - Checkboxes for pending documents, 'X document(s) selected' message, Approve All/Reject All/Clear buttons
frontend_tests.review_dialog: PASSED - Shows document name, uploader info ('Uploaded by: Jane Smith on 4/3/2026'), Review Status dropdown, Comment textarea with '(required)' indicator for rejection, character counter, View File button, Submit Review button
frontend_tests.comment_validation: PASSED - Submit button disabled when: no comment for rejection, comment < 5 chars. Enabled when valid comment provided
frontend_tests.case_detail_docs: PASSED - Shows 'By: Jane Smith' (uploader), 'Review (Case Manager): Document is blurry...' (reviewer + comment)
frontend_tests.pending_review_tab: PASSED - Shows count badge, 'X Documents Awaiting Review' header, document cards with Review button

features_verified: POST /api/documents/review requires comment (min 5 chars) when status is 'rejected' - returns 400 without comment - VERIFIED
POST /api/documents/review requires comment (min 5 chars) when status is 'revision_required' - returns 400 without comment - VERIFIED
POST /api/documents/review stores reviewer_name in document record - VERIFIED
POST /api/documents/review notifies the uploader with detailed message including rejection reason - VERIFIED
GET /api/documents/case/{case_id} returns uploader_name and reviewer_name for each document - VERIFIED
Case Manager Dashboard Documents tab shows search & filter (by query, type, status) - VERIFIED
Case Manager Dashboard Documents tab has batch selection (checkboxes) for pending documents with Approve All / Reject All buttons - VERIFIED
Case Manager Dashboard review dialog requires comment when rejecting or requesting revision - VERIFIED
Case Manager Dashboard review dialog has 'View File' download button - VERIFIED
Case Manager Dashboard case detail shows uploader name and review comments for each document - VERIFIED
Case Manager Dashboard 'Request Additional Document' also creates a ticket for the client - VERIFIED (frontend creates ticket via POST /api/tickets)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_cm_document_privileges.py - Created P1 CM Document Privileges test suite

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 passed, 4 skipped due to no pending docs in fixture)

seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded during testing: test_review_doc.txt, test_rejection_doc.txt. Test ticket created for additional document request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Case Manager Document Privileges fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Document review endpoint requires comment (min 5 chars) for rejection/revision_required status - returns 400 without valid comment, (2) reviewer_name stored in document record and returned by GET /api/documents/case/{id}, (3) uploader_name also returned for each document, (4) CM Dashboard Documents tab has search/filter by query/type/status, batch selection with Approve All/Reject All buttons, (5) Review dialog shows uploader info, has View File button, requires comment for rejection with character counter, (6) Case detail shows 'By: [uploader]' and 'Review ([reviewer]): [comment]' for each document, (7) Request Additional Document creates ticket via POST /api/tickets with category 'document'. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cm_document_privileges.py
